leadText: The Beach Glass (Japanese: うみべのガラス Beach Glass) is a valuable item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Beach Glass serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A piece of colored glass. Waves have rounded its edges. It's slightly rough to the touch.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO Many Trainers like to carry a piece of beach glass like this as a lucky charm. Knowing this, some Pokémon like to collect pieces as gifts for their favorite Trainers.
